mapper.select:
select test_paper.*, course.name as courseName, teacher.name as teacherName, teacher.username as teacherUsername from `test_paper` left join course on test_paper.course_id = course.id left join teacher on test_paper.teacher_id = teacher.id
and LOWER(test_paper.name) like LOWER(concat('%', #{name}, '%')) and test_paper.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and LOWER(course.name) like LOWER(concat('%', #{courseName}, '%'))

select test_paper.*, course.name as courseName, teacher.name as teacherName, teacher.username as teacherUsername from `test_paper` left join course on test_paper.course_id = course.id left join teacher on test_paper.teacher_id = teacher.id where test_paper.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into `test_paper`
id, name, course_id, teacher_id, type, level,
#{id}, #{name}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{type}, #{level},
